stitchHint: Merge the done scene drafts into one chapter
stitchNeedsDone: All scenes must be done to stitch
errNoChapterPlan: Decompose this chapter into scenes first.
errNoSceneDrafts: No completed scene drafts to stitch yet.
errScenesNotDone: Mark all scenes done before stitching.
noWork: No co-writer Work for this book yet.
markDoneHint: Mark this scene done — required before the chapter can be published

beatsheet.title: Beat Sheet
beatsheet.empty: Pick a structure template to see its beats and your coverage.

scenegraph.title: Scene Graph
scenegraph.selectTwo: Click two scenes to link them ({{n}}/2)
scenegraph.label: label (optional)
scenegraph.linkExists: A link of that kind already exists between these scenes.
scenegraph.empty: No scenes yet — plan some scenes in the outline to see the graph.

codex.title: Cast & Codex
codex.windowUnknown: Reading position unknown — state may be incomplete.
codex.noProject: No knowledge graph yet — extract this book to populate the codex.
codex.noMatch: No cast members match your search.
codex.empty: No extracted entities yet — publish/extract to populate the codex.

relations.title: Relationship Map
relations.noProject: No knowledge graph yet — extract this book to map relationships.
relations.noRelations: This entity has no relations yet.

workSettings.defaultModelHint: Used as the starting model for this book. A stronger model is the biggest prose-quality lever.
workSettings.assemblyModeHint: chapter = one coherent pass per chapter (better long-form continuity); per_scene = granular scene-by-scene.
workSettings.narrativeThreadHint: Advisory: detects open promises and re-injects them so generation honors/pays them; surfaces unpaid promises as a debt view. Opt-in.
workSettings.saveError: Could not save settings — try again.

statsIntro: Your corrections are the quality signal. Lower edit/regenerate/reject (and higher accept) in Diverge means the K-option reranker is earning its time.
statsColdStart: No generations yet — compose a few scenes and your accept/edit/regenerate rates will appear here.
reasoningHint: Auto = the server decides per model. Off disables thinking; Low/Med/High force it.
divergeHint: Generate several options and pick, edit, or regenerate the best (non-streaming).
groundingEmptyHint: No knowledge graph yet — run a knowledge extraction on this book once to ground the co-writer. After that, publishing chapters keeps the canon up to date automatically.
rulePlaceholder: A canon rule the co-writer must respect…
canonUncheckedNoCast: no tracked characters in this scene
canonUncheckedNoPosition: this scene has no reading-order position yet
reviseGuide: Keep canon consistent: {{name}} is gone from the story by this scene — do not portray them as present or acting.

plan.premise: Premise — what is this arc about?
plan.replace_prompt: {{count}} chapter(s) already have scenes. Replace them with this plan?
plan.err_no_chapters: This book has no chapters yet — create chapters before planning.
plan.err_too_many_chapters: Too many chapters to plan at once.
plan.err_bad_entity: Some scene cast members are not in this book's glossary.
plan.err_bad_chapter: A chapter in the plan is not part of this book.

outline.title: Outline
outline.empty: No outline yet. Use the Planner (right panel) to decompose chapters into scenes.
outline.conflict: This node was edited elsewhere — refreshed.

corkboard.empty: No chapters yet. Plan chapters first, then add scene cards.
corkboard.emptyBand: No scenes in {{chapter}} — add a card.
